# aipolicy

> Generate AI policy and tool config files (AI_POLICY.md, AGENTS.md,
> CLAUDE.md, Copilot, Cursor) for repositories.
> No install, no sign-up. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.

## URL
https://aipolicy.1mb.dev

## What This Does
Generates files that declare how AI tools should interact with a codebase:
canonical policy (AI_POLICY.md), agent rules (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md), and
tool-specific configs (.github/copilot-instructions.md for GitHub Copilot,
.cursor/rules/aipolicy.mdc for Cursor IDE).

## Endpoints
- / — Interactive generator (select preset, customize, download ZIP)
- /conventions.json — Convention sources and references (v1.1)
- /presets/<preset>/ — Static preset files for curl/wget download. Files
  are served flat; the ZIP download from the web UI uses canonical nested
  paths (.github/copilot-instructions.md, .cursor/rules/aipolicy.mdc).

## Presets
- open — AI tools welcome, standard quality bar
- standard — Sets boundaries, requires human review
- strict — Restricts AI tools, explicit approval required

## Source
https://github.com/1mb-dev/aipolicy
